question_text:

D: confused

A: The basketball game it was exciting and full of action.
B: The basketball game, it was exciting and full of action.
C: The basketball game was exciting and full of action.
D: The basketball game exciting and full of action was.

Which is the best version of this sentence?

A: The concert was cancelled due to the fact that there was bad weather.
B: The concert was cancelled because of bad weather.
C: The concert it was cancelled due to the fact that bad weather happened.
D: The concert was cancelled on account of the fact that the weather was bad.

Which is the most effective way to write this sentence?

A: The museum tour guide, she showed us ancient artifacts from Egypt.
B: The museum tour guide she showed us ancient artifacts from Egypt.
C: The museum tour guide showed us ancient artifacts from Egypt.
D: The museum tour guide her showed us ancient artifacts from Egypt.

Which sentence is written most effectively?

A: The reason why the library was closed was because of the holiday.
B: The library was closed because of the holiday.
C: The library was closed due to the fact that it was a holiday.
D: The library it was closed because of the holiday.

Which is the most effective way to write this sentence?

A: The scientist discovered a new species of butterfly in the rainforest that was previously unknown.
B: The scientist discovered a previously unknown new species of butterfly in the rainforest.
C: The scientist discovered a new species of butterfly in the rainforest.
D: The scientist she discovered a new species of butterfly in the rainforest that nobody knew about before.

Which sentence is written most effectively?

A: The reason the experiment failed was due to the fact that the temperature was too high.
B: The experiment failed because the temperature was too high.
C: The experiment it failed because of the temperature being too high.
D: The experiment failed due to the fact that the temperature was too high.

Which sentence is written most effectively?

A: The astronauts they prepared for the mission by training for many months.
B: The astronauts prepared for the mission by training for many months.
C: The astronauts, they prepared for the mission by training for many months.
D: The astronauts prepared for the mission by they training for many months.

Which sentence shows the best use of language and structure?

A: The documentary was interesting and it was informative and it taught us about ocean life.
B: The documentary, which was interesting, and it was also informative, taught us about ocean life.
C: The documentary was interesting and informative, teaching us about ocean life.
D: The documentary it was both interesting and also informative and taught us about ocean life.

C: The company made heaps more money from selling things on the internet.
D: The company's profits they went up because of better online selling.

B: After climbing for many hours, the exhausted mountain climbers reached the summit.
C: The mountain climbers they reached the summit and they had climbed for many hours and were exhausted.
D: The mountain climbers reached the summit and they were exhausted after they had climbed for many hours.
